task_completion.description: Navigate to the 'Projects' workspace in the document management system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Nuxeo web interface should display the 'Projects' workspace, verifiable via breadcrumbs (e.g., Domain > Workspaces > Projects) or the page title.

task_completion.description: Locate the three specific documents to be renamed within the workspace.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The workspace document list should show the target documents ('Annual Report 2023', 'Project Proposal', and 'Q3 Status Report') before or during the renaming process.
The document list or the document's detail view shows the title explicitly updated to 'PROJ-2023-Annual Report 2023'.
The document list or the document's detail view shows the title explicitly updated to 'PROJ-2023-Project Proposal'.

task_completion.description: Rename 'Q3 Status Report' to 'PROJ-2023-Q3 Status Report'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The document list or the document's detail view shows the title explicitly updated to 'PROJ-2023-Q3 Status Report'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Nuxeo web interface to rename the documents.
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser showing the Nuxeo GUI should be visible. There should be no terminal windows open executing curl or API commands to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the renamed titles.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's Developer Tools (Inspect Element) pane should not be open in any of the screenshots.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Nuxeo application rather than a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The renaming actions and final results must be visible within the Nuxeo document management system's interface, not in a separate text file or notes app.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task targets a Nuxeo Platform workspace at path '/default-domain/workspaces/Projects'. The expected renamed titles are exactly: 'PROJ-2023-Annual Report 2023', 'PROJ-2023-Project Proposal', and 'PROJ-2023-Q3 Status Report'. Verify that these exact strings appear as the new document titles in the Nuxeo interface.
